findings.message: archiveSource writes dest then rmSync src with no overwrite/duplicate-source guard; a malformed approved map (same source in two domains, or dest collision) causes silent overwrite or a mid-loop throw leaving a partially-mutated tree.
findings.recommendation: Validate the approved map for cross-domain source duplication; refuse to overwrite an existing dest; stage moves and delete originals only after all writes succeed.

findings.message: Drift baseline (sourceHashes) is only set at first synthesis; no CLI path re-synthesizes a drifted domain and refreshes the baseline, so a domain can stay permanently DRIFTed without hand-editing the map JSON.
findings.recommendation: Add an explicit --resynth/--force path to re-synthesize and refresh recorded hashes.

findings.message: TEST-203 (AC-11 e2e gate) is an assertion-free marker; passes by reachability only.
findings.recommendation: Assert a concrete end-state invariant or remove it.

findings.message: validateArchivedFrontmatter exported but never called; _archive is excluded from audit scan so archived frontmatter is never schema-validated.
findings.recommendation: Wire it into checkLinkIntegrity/an archive-audit mode, or remove.

findings.message: inCanonical predicate ORs three overlapping checks (POSIX coincident); collapsible.
findings.recommendation: Reduce to a single path test.

findings.message: DOC_ID_RE imported but unused (file uses its own BODY_ID_RE).

OUT OF SCOPE: docs-audit suite exits 1 on D9 default-hard-fail test. Verified PRE-EXISTING via git stash (not caused by SPEC-0002); caused by commit c7ad5db. SPEC-0002 Verification lists this suite as an exit-0 gate, so the stale test should be reconciled separately.
findings.recommendation: Open a techdebt item to update the stale D9 test.

independent_verification.test_aai_docs_audit_sh: exit 1, PRE-EXISTING (D9), confirmed identical with in-scope files stashed
